description: This file implements a persona-driven search service for roles, including functions for matching query tokens against role data, handling cached recommendations, and fetching recommendation pools. It exports a main function 'exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven' for searching roles based on persona and query parameters.

methods.name: _normStr
methods.description: Normalizes a string value by converting to string and trimming whitespace.

methods.name: _safeSlice
methods.description: Safely slices an array to a maximum of n elements.

methods.name: _matchesQuery
methods.description: Checks if all tokens in the query are present in the concatenated role fields.

methods.name: _looksLikeLegacySimpleRecommendedRole
methods.description: Determines if a role object matches the legacy simple recommended role shape.

methods.name: _looksLikeInitialRecommendationsPool
methods.description: Checks if a roles array resembles the initial recommendations pool, excluding legacy simple roles.

methods.name: exploreSearchRolesPersonaDriven
methods.description: Main exported function that performs persona-driven role search, utilizing cache or fetching new recommendations as needed.
